import docx
doc = docx.Document\('input/\(20260310\)__답변서__동부2026가소22648__draft__익명화.docx'\)

with open\('_temp_tables.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    for ti, table in enumerate\(doc.tables\):
        f.write\(f'=== TABLE {ti} ===\\n'\)
        for ri, row in enumerate\(table.rows\):
            cells = [cell.text for cell in row.cells]
            f.write\(f'  Row {ri}: {cells}\\n'\)
        f.write\('\\n'\)
print\('done'\)
